review_title: I use v maker for my marketing company
description: It’s a part of my daily go-to software for recording explainer videos or tutorials online. Saves me from having to record on my laptop and then waiting for it to be uploaded on YouTube.
author: Mehak K.
pros: I love that I can instantly click on the banker plug-in on my Google chrome & instantly record my screen. I use this for training my staff on designing websites, as well as sending tutorial videos to my clients. It’s so convenient as I can send a shareable link straight away, see if anyone has viewed my video & retitle it as I please.Definitely recommended for those who run a service based business!
cons: Sometimes I have to sign in as the plug-in logs me out randomly on Google chrome, which delays me by a few minutes but it’s not a deal breaker.

review_title: A solid option for sharing videos and walkthroughs
author: Danielle Z.
pros: I really like being able to record my screen simply and reliably. The price was great for the value. It wasn't the cheapest and isn't the fanciest but is a really great balance of the two. It does what I need it to do.
cons: I wish there was a firefox extension. That's the browser I currently use the most. Also, it's great that I can share the videos with people, but it's so important to me to be able to allow people to download their videos. While they can download them, it seems to be difficult for people to figure out how to do that. I understand wanting to prevent too many bots or random downloads, but I'd love it if I could maybe provide a password or have a specific link I can share or some way to allow people to download without having to create an account. One client thought they had to download the software and was having trouble so I had to download it and share it via Dropbox.

review_title: I regretted giving them a shot (Day 2 as a user)
author: Shawn Y.
pros: Since I'm required to provide the positives. I would say it is fairly simple to use for simple video editing. That's it. There are better and cheaper alternatives out there. Capcut, Invideo, CaptionsAi.
cons: 1) Poor customer support. It has been an hour since I wrote to support. The only reply I got was to ask me to explain the issue. It has been 35 minutes after and I'm still waiting for a reply. 2) Inconsistent feature performance. An error prompt that kept showing when I tried to edit a video. I am unable to perform a simple edit and it has been over 1.5 hours. Disruptive! 3) Unable to test their "premium" AI feature. Deliverables = unknown. Good luck asking clients to pay more for it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Indespensible tool for working with my overseas team
description: I am finding creative ways to use Vmaker in my life. It's fun to send a link to my mom to show her how to do something or just say hello. Also, whenever I have a tech support issue or something wrong with a purchase, I just make a quick video of the problem I am having and send the link via email or chat. It saves me SO MUCH HEADACHE going back and forth trying to explain the problem to someone. I always use a friendly tone of voice when showing the problem and I think the person watching the video feels more like helping me because of the more personal touch. I'm always trying to find ways to use Vmaker instead of just email.
author: Sandy S.
pros: When I first hired my team of virtual assistants, I used Loom to make short videos of "test tasks" I wanted them to perform for me. That worked okay, but to make videos longer than 5 minutes, I would need to go with a pro plan so I started comparing other similar products. I found Vmaker to have everything I needed and (at the time) there was a lifetime deal on a team plan that I snapped up. This plan allows me to give my team members access so they can make screen recordings for me so they can show me *exactly* what issues they may be having. I encourage them to send me a lot of videos to give me suggestions for ways they think we can improve our workflow or anything else they want to discuss with me. I use the Vmaker dashboard a lot because I can organize my videos into folders by topic and can reference them later. I really like that I can just put a shortcut to Vmaker on the dock of my MacBook Pro so I can quickly record a thought or bit of instruction without waiting a long time to open and set up a recording app. It is quick and easy!
cons: I really wish there was a feature to easily add captions to my videos without having to use a 3rd party app.

review_title: Making things easier than expected
description: Ten out of ten, I can't ask much more, just to get the windows app improved.
author: Alexandro L.
pros: How easy is to start using it. Install, login and click record to have everything online.I'm a disaster with data, so I value being able to have folders where I can store the videos I recorded, and also having subfolders inside.Sharing a link is a breeze: record, stop recording and the link gets copied automatically after you stop the record.
cons: For windows users: they have the info about shortcuts just for Mac, so you have to guess the windows ones.App performance for windows (not browser extension), needs to be improved.

review_title: Wouldn't buy again
author: Katelyn P.
pros: The ease of screening recording through the internet with the Google Chrome extenion
cons: I have attempted to email [sensitive content hidden] several times as his Auto email kept asking how we were liking Vmaker but, whatever server you use kept rejecting our email responses. Unfortunately I can't touch the video I initially tried to email you but see you below. I'm pretty unhappy with my plan. I ordered it to record some videos while in Google Meets, but the system has glitched out on me both times I have tried. I've attached a screenshot of the video that took over 24 hours to load. I did not close my laptop or exit the screen as required, but it has yet to progress despite even being plugged in overnight. After stopping the recording, the first video did not copy to the clipboard, and for some reason, I got a pop-up that said "cancelled copy to clipboard." At this point, I have had to switch screen providers as the training I need these for was very important.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A very good tool for record your screen and share it easily
description: As I said, I use Vmaker to record tutorial video and share it to my client. It is very helpful for me and for them.
author: Mickael A.
pros: It is very easy to use. I like the product, the ease to record and share a video to a client. I use it to record tutorials for my clients.
cons: We can't share a video and protect it by a password. For example, I have many client for I use Vmaker to record tutorial. I would like to share videos to them and add a password to the video, because by default, when I share a video with a client, he can see all my video.

review_title: Excellent tool to record your screen
description: I record my screen with a simple and intuitive interface that avoids many errors.
author: Laurent B.
pros: This tool is very easy to use to get the job done with basic editing functions. - 4K recording quality and unlimited storage are very generous. - Its clear, fun and intuitive dashboard - Its customer service,
cons: It is not possible to have separate tracks for audio editing. With a dual screen, it is not possible to choose which screen to record on
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Vmaker is a great communication tool with a bright future ahead of it
description: Overall, I am quite happy with the product and the team. They seem to have ambitious goals for the future and I am confident that this communication SaaS is sure to pay itself back if you use it right and the "non-on-brand" issue is not an issue for you.
author: Atte S.
pros: The ease of use the by far the best thing about Vmaker. In addition to that, the 4k video is super sharp. The interface is clean and doesn't have anything "too much" on it, it's easy to navigate and you really don't need to see or read any tutorials to "just know" how everything works. The Mac app is also a nice bonus for any Mac user even so that I am not one. That being said, I am more than happy with my chrome extension as it works fine for what I use it for.
cons: The tool has some issues with branding. In case you don't need a full 100% control over your brand look on the "video share page" then this is certainly not an issue.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: not worth the money
description: worst experience with the support and the false promises they make.
author: Saradhi Ph.D A.
pros: ease of use until it works. had browser extension and app.
cons: I purchased your app through the AppSumo deal. It functioned perfectly for a few months, but now I encounter an error when pressing the record button. Initially, I suspected the issue stemmed from macOS updates. However, I confirmed it originated from your app after using alternative screen recording tools without problems. I reported this error to your support team, and they assured me it would be fixed in the next update. Unfortunately, despite 2-3 updates being released, the issue persists. When I contacted them again, I received no concrete solutions or timelines. Due to this lack of resolution, I won't be considering future purchases or recommending your products.

review_title: Good Screen Recorder, Can be Great.
description: So far so good. Support team has been really helpful. I had the developer on call once to help recover the video which is something I don't see often.
author: Karunya V.
pros: The ease of use with the product is amazing. Even if you are completely new to tech, this product can get you going all by yourself. Appreciate the user experience front of the product. The packed features are simple and gets the job done without any noise.
cons: I think Vmaker has to grow a lot compared to the peers in the market. Especially with companies coming up with AI integrations and email integrations, Vmaker has a long way to go. They are good as a screen recorder, but today they have to offer a bit more than that to stand tall.

review_title: Great video recording and screen capture software
author: Aizat H.
pros: I love the customer service. They always try to help you and listen to feedback. Video quality and streaming are very good, too - no lags and fast loading.
cons: However, the app lacks a few critical features that it's competitor has, like Berrycast. I would love to have a comment section for viewers who are given the link to respond.

review_title: just capture VDO and share to the one that needs to.
author: Vorapoj K.
pros: easy to start recording. and share almost instantly !
cons: I have to wait the files or anything to upload to the website. Not sure, if it can be the install software and run in the background instead. I just need the link share to others and move to other task instead of waiting.

review_title: Easy to use free screen recorder
description: I use Vmaker to create creative briefs for my designers and animators. It's easier to show reference on my screen while I can record my face explaining what I need in the creative. This is 100x simpler than typing the creative briefs, adding screenshots and giving references.
author: Bhanu R.
pros: Best part about Vmaker is that I need not worry about the cap on the recording duration. I used to use Loom which wouldn't let me record more than 5 minutes in the free plan. Now, it's easy for me to record longer videos and share it with anyone.
cons: It is currently available only for mac as a stand alone application. Though I have been using mac, I am not able to make my entire team start using Vmaker for internal communication since most of them are on Windows. Vmaker website says their Windows version is coming soon. That would do a lot of good.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Aplicación con potencial pero actualmente llena de bugs
description: En general mi experiencia con Vmaker ha sido negativa y no recomendaría a nadie con un proyecto serio cambiar de Loom u otra plataforma hacia Vmaker. Tienen características muy interesantes en su roadmap y quizás en el futuro terminen ofreciendo un buen software, pero ahora mismo solo están comercializando un producto que está lejos de cualquier estándar mínimo de calidad.
author: Dnia C.
pros: Vmaker es una aplicación que permite la grabación de la pantalla del ordenador, el micrófono y la cámara del ordenador. Tiene aplicación para Mac, pero para Windows debes usarlo desde su extensión. Uno de los principales puntos positivos es que permite grabar en 4K y su tecnología de reducción de ruido funciona bastante bien, eso sí, la grabación de la voz tiene también bugs.
cons: Vmaker tiene tantos bugs que es difícil enumerarlos todos. Para empezar puede que estés grabando media hora para después encontrarte con que la plataforma no termina de subir el vídeo. O incluso, que ya haya subido el vídeo y sea imposible descargarlo de la plataforma. La grabación del audio es muy clara, pero en ocasiones se graba con interrupciones. Al final de grabar un vídeo al que le has puesto mucho esfuerzo terminas viendo que es imposible usarlo, ya sea por los problemas en el audio o simplemente porque no se ha subido a la plataforma.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Vmaker is a great alternative
author: Loulu L.
pros: ease of use for myself and those watching. easy to embed files as well.
cons: the constant login requirement from my computer. It doesn't remember me

review_title: great for customer service especially in a business that needs detailed instructions
author: James M.
pros: 4k, auto sync with cloud. I like 4k because i use it for options trading tutorial
cons: nothing. record and store to the cloud and send to clients or friends videos.

review_title: Excellent Alternative to Loom
author: Dean G.
pros: Very intuitive and easy to use. The tutorials are excellent and will get you started right away. And if you need support they are very accessible. If you are wanting to leave Loom, this is the product to try.
cons: The UI could use some work, but other than that it is great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good Solution
author: stan K.
pros: That we can record session with team Training and share it for further education.
cons: All good so far. Can't complain. Would love to have windows app.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good tool missing an important feature
author: Simona T.
pros: It's very easy to use and great customer service.
cons: As we already discussed with you, the feature that is missing is the possibility to do the screen recording and the voice separately and then editing the video later, combining the voice and the screen for a perfect display.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Better than Loom
description: I simply love it. I use it on our project for delivering video tutorial guides on how to use our system.
author: Roville S.
pros: It is easier to use and has more features compared to Loom. Plus was able to get this as a deal.
cons: Actually, everything works great. But I think they can still improve the User Interface a bit.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Browser-Screenrecordings for social media with one click
description: Very helpful to explain things easy
author: Ulf K.
pros: Easy browser plugin integration and high quality recording of browser and webcam central managed user for company use
cons: I would like to have the possibility not just record the browser but the screen (eg. presentation) as well

review_title: Cooles Produkt!
author: Alexander P.
pros: Sehr intuitiv in der Verwendung und praktisch!
cons: Alles cool! Bin mit dem Tool völlig zufrieden!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great software for a video editor
description: My overall experience has been positive. We have been able to edit videos in a way that we never were able to before, as well as implement processes that cut down my personal work time on certain projects
author: Sanam P.
pros: What I liked most about this product is the various features that are included. It definitely makes a difference in the presentation and the value of the content that you were putting out. We have been very happy with the content ever since purchasing the software.
cons: What I like least is the back up feature. I believe that it did not work for me one time as I’ve said before, when I lost five minutes of recording time. It’s not a big deal but it definitely would’ve been beneficial had it worked
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great loom alternative
author: Spoorthy A.
pros: The interface is clean and minimalistic, so it's easy to work with. There isn't anything overbearing or scary about it, and you don't need to read any tutorials as you'll know how everything works without them. Chrome extension is straightforward to use and looks similar to other extensions like loom, but with additional features like changing the frames for webcam recording. Vmaker allows you to capture in different modes like screen only, Webcam only and Screen + Webcam. Record 4k videos and edit the videos directly on Vmaker. The 4k video is super sharp. While capturing any meeting or a game vmaker allows you to record system audio, so you don’t miss out on any audio. We can annotate videos if you are recording the video for a tutorial or giving feedback to your team.
cons: No Cname and No CTA on pro plans they are available only on Enterprise plan
